test: ACI diff/change-review mode on real merged PRs
corpus: 15 recent non-merge commits across textual, poetry, httpx (5 each)

before_file_level.note: file-level diff scans whole changed files; 83% of findings were >40 lines from any change -- pre-existing issues in touched files

after_change_aware.note: change-aware scoping keeps only findings whose construct (function/class span) or exact line overlaps the changed lines

result: 70 file-level findings -> 8 change-relevant findings; the 8 are structural concerns (god class / long function) the PR actually modified inside
